cases.expectedPlanStep: Narrow the verification path before requesting workspace execution again.
cases.objective: Prepare a narrow verification path and approval review for workspace execution in verification lane alpha.
cases.promotionNote: Narrow the verification path before requesting workspace execution again. Preserve verification lane alpha in the review.
cases.title: Execution verification feedback

cases.expectedPlanStep: Address the prior reviewer finding before drafting the next proposal.
cases.objective: Recover a reviewer failed evidence trace before the next proposal review in evidence lane beta.
cases.promotionNote: The reviewer failed the evidence trace. Preserve evidence lane beta and address the prior reviewer finding before drafting the next proposal.
cases.title: Reviewer evidence feedback

cases.expectedPlanStep: Address the prior reviewer finding before drafting the next proposal.

cases.title: Incident handoff feedback
